hero.title: Connect Claude, Cursor, or your own agents to public, internal, and localhost APIs — with secure access control.
hero.subtitle: Approve every connection from your phone. Your credentials never leave NyxID.
hero.ctaSubtext: Nyx guards the gate — Discord holds the key
features.heading: What Nyx protects
features.subheading: Every feature guards the threshold between access and breach. You always know exactly what you're approving — nothing passes unseen.
features.pushApprovals.title: Real-Time Push Approvals
features.pushApprovals.description: When a protected system needs verification, NyxID sends a push to your phone instantly. Approve or deny with one tap — no codes to copy, no apps to open first.
features.seeBeforeApprove.title: See Before You Approve
features.seeBeforeApprove.description: Every request shows you exactly what's happening: the resource, operation, status, and expiry window. Spot suspicious activity before you ever tap Approve.
features.securityByDesign.title: Security by Design
features.securityByDesign.description: Secrets stay in the dark. Authentication tokens live in the device keychain. Push notifications contain no sensitive content — details are only fetched when you open the app. Minimal attack surface by default.
features.manageRevoke.title: Manage & Revoke in Real Time
features.manageRevoke.description: Active approvals are visible and manageable directly from the app. Revoke access immediately if something looks wrong — no admin portal required.
whyNyx.label: Why "Nyx"
whyNyx.quote: Nyx — the primordial goddess of night. Born from Chaos. Feared even by Zeus. She guards the threshold between the known and the unknown.
whyNyx.para1: Authentication is a liminal moment — the crossing point between anonymous and known, between denied and granted. NyxID stands at that threshold.
whyNyx.para2: Like its namesake, NyxID keeps secrets in the dark. Credentials never surface in notifications. Tokens live in the device keychain, never in app storage. The proxy holds your API keys so your applications never see them directly.
whyNyx.para3: What Nyx holds, no one sees. What she approves, passes through. What she denies, stays in the dark.
howItWorks.heading: Crossing the threshold
howItWorks.subheading: Three steps between anonymous and authenticated.
howItWorks.step1.title: Sign In With Your Identity Provider
howItWorks.step1.description: Log into NyxID Mobile using your existing Google, GitHub, or Apple account. No new passwords to create — NyxID connects to however your organization already manages identity.
howItWorks.step2.title: Receive a Push When It Matters
howItWorks.step2.description: When a high-risk login or access request is triggered, NyxID sends you a push notification. Open the app to see full details: who's asking, what they want, and for how long.
howItWorks.step3.title: Approve or Deny With One Tap
howItWorks.step3.description: You decide. Approve to grant time-limited access, or deny to block it immediately. Your decision is logged, the requesting system is notified in real time, and you're done.
whoItsFor.heading: Who Nyx guards
whoItsFor.subheading: Built for teams where access decisions carry real consequences.
whoItsFor.developers.title: Developers & Platform Engineers
whoItsFor.developers.description: Building IAM into your product or service? NyxID gives you SDK-friendly, API-first authentication with real approval workflows — not just TOTP codes.
whoItsFor.security.title: IT & Security Teams
whoItsFor.security.description: Responsible for org-wide access control? NyxID delivers compliance-ready audit trails, approval workflows, and minimal-footprint push notifications your SOC team will appreciate.
whoItsFor.founders.title: Founders & Small Teams
whoItsFor.founders.description: Need enterprise-grade security without the overhead? Connect via Google sign-in, set up push approvals for deploys, and revoke access instantly — all from the mobile app.
carousel.heading: See what Nyx sees
carousel.subheading: Every request, every decision, every credential — visible to you, hidden from everything else.
beta.heading: Step into the dark with us
beta.subheading: NyxID is in closed beta. Join us on Discord and our team will share an invitation code when there's room.
beta.disclaimer: Invites are limited and rolled out as capacity opens. No spam, ever.
